researcher_notes: Pricing verified via WebFetch/WebSearch against each competitor's own pricing pages or recent third-party comparison articles (Apr 2026). Where pricing is hidden behind a sales gate, the estimate is flagged ESTIMATED and sourced from the most recent publicly cited figure.

elitez_eor_context.target: Singapore citizens/PRs at micro-SMEs (1-5 employees) with a secondary 6+ tier

competitors.name: Deel
competitors.target_market: Global startups & SMBs hiring remote workers across 150+ countries
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$599/emp/mo (Standard EOR); US$899/emp/mo (Enterprise EOR). Contractors US$49/mo. Singapore-specific rate not separately published.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Fastest global EOR with slickest UX and largest country coverage.
strengths: Best-in-class product UX and onboarding speed
Large platform: visas, equity, IP, benefits
weaknesses: 13x more expensive than Elitez for a SG local hire
Designed for cross-border, not SG-local micro-SMEs
Support quality drops for sub-10 headcount accounts

competitors.name: Remote
competitors.target_market: Distributed-team startups, US/EU companies hiring in APAC
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$699/emp/mo monthly, US$599/emp/mo annual. Contractors US$29/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Owned-entity EOR with strong IP & compliance posture for hiring globally.
strengths: Owned entity in SG (no partner markup)
Good IP protection for tech employers
weaknesses: 10x+ Elitez price for same SG-local hire
Not aimed at owners of 1-5 person local businesses
No SG tax/CPF advisory for domestic SMEs

competitors.name: Multiplier
competitors.target_market: APAC-first startups hiring across SEA + India
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$400/emp/mo advertised; US$299/emp/mo for volume. Some sources cite US$450.
competitors.primary_value_prop: APAC-native EOR, SG HQ, faster onboarding for SEA hires.
strengths: Cheapest of the VC-backed global EORs
weaknesses: Primarily serves foreign employers, not SG owners

competitors.name: Oyster HR
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$599-699/emp/mo. Contractors US$29/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Mission-driven EOR for remote-first teams with strong compliance.

competitors.name: G-P (Globalization Partners)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Typically US$800-1,000+/emp/mo (not published). Often 10-20% of salary.
competitors.primary_value_prop: The OG enterprise EOR, owned entities in every major market.
weaknesses: Not priced for SMEs at all

competitors.name: Velocity Global (Pebl)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$399/emp/mo promo (was US$599). Add-ons push real cost ~US$529+.
competitors.primary_value_prop: AI-first global EOR (rebranded from Velocity Global in 2025).

competitors.name: Rippling EOR
competitors.target_market: US mid-market scaling into global hiring
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Base Rippling Unity US$8/emp/mo + EOR add-on ~US$500/emp/mo (ESTIMATED, sales-gated).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Unified HRIS + EOR + IT + payroll on one platform.

competitors.name: Papaya Global
competitors.sg_pricing_published: EOR from US$650/emp/mo; global payroll from US$20/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Enterprise workforce payments + compliance, banking-grade.

competitors.name: Remofirst
competitors.target_market: Startups hiring globally on a budget
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$199/emp/mo (EOR); US$25/mo contractors.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Budget global EOR, undercutting Deel/Remote.
strengths: Cheapest of the global EORs publicly

competitors.name: Omnipresent
competitors.target_market: Mid-market European & US employers hiring APAC
competitors.sg_pricing_published: From US$599/emp/mo (quote-based).
competitors.primary_value_prop: White-glove mid-market global EOR.

competitors.name: Atlas
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$595/emp/mo starting (quote-based).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Direct-employer EOR owning 100+ entities.

competitors.name: Skuad (Payoneer)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: US$199-399/emp/mo (EOR); US$19/mo contractors.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Payoneer-backed EOR with APAC focus, low entry price.

competitors.name: Horizons
competitors.sg_pricing_published: From US$299/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: APAC-specialist EOR with low entry price.
weaknesses: Product is less polished than Multiplier

competitors.name: Safeguard Global
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based; industry-reported ~US$500-700/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Managed global payroll with EOR overlay.

competitors.name: Playroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: From US$399/emp/mo EOR.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Fast, lower-cost global EOR aimed at SMBs.
weaknesses: Partner entities in some SEA markets

competitors.name: AYP Group
competitors.target_market: MNCs and APAC employers hiring in SG/SEA
competitors.sg_pricing_published: EOR from SGD/USD$488/emp/mo; Payroll from $28/emp/mo.
competitors.sg_pricing_sgd_equivalent_per_emp_per_mo: S$488 EOR / S$28 payroll (likely USD but quoted as $)
competitors.primary_value_prop: APAC EOR with 15+ years SG compliance heritage.
weaknesses: USER CONFIRMED: old-school UI, slow onboarding
Legacy sales motion, not micro-SME friendly

competitors.name: Links International
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Payroll outsourcing S$9-28/emp/mo; EOR quote-based (~US$400-700 industry range).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Recruitment+HRO+EOR bundled for APAC mid-market.

competitors.name: Tricor (Vistra)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based. Typical managed payroll ~S$20-40/emp/mo for SG; EOR premium.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Corp-sec + accounting + payroll + HR in one for big firms.

competitors.name: Asanify
competitors.sg_pricing_published: EOR from US$199/emp/mo Singapore.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Lowest-cost APAC EOR targeted at lean startups.

competitors.name: Talenox
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Payroll/Leave S$4.36/emp/mo (min S$21.80 for 5); Suite S$7.63/emp/mo (min S$38.15). Part-time ~half. Inclusive of GST.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Simple, affordable SG payroll software for SMEs.

competitors.name: QuickHR
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs wanting HR+payroll SaaS, PSG-funded
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Essentials S$5/emp/mo; Enhanced S$10/emp/mo; Enterprise S$15/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: All-in-one HRIS+payroll with PSG grant support.
weaknesses: No CPF filing as a service

competitors.name: Payboy
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Pay-per-use modular, calculator-based. Payroll module from S$3.50/emp/mo. Promo 'S$3 migration'. PSG 50%.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Modular SG payroll with 'pay for what you use'.

competitors.name: JustLogin
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs across industries (30+ yrs incumbent)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Essential / Growth / Enterprise tiers – not publicly displayed; industry reports ~S$3-8/emp/mo range.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Long-standing SG HRIS/payroll with deep compliance.

competitors.name: HReasily
competitors.sg_pricing_published: From S$3/emp/mo. Classic/Pro/Plus tiers – exact per-tier pricing gated behind sales.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Affordable, PSG-pre-approved SG payroll used by 70k+ users.
strengths: Very large SG SME install base

competitors.name: Swingvy
competitors.sg_pricing_published: HR Hub S$5/emp/mo; Payroll add-on S$5/emp/mo; Time add-on S$3/emp/mo. 15% annual discount.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Modern SME HRIS+payroll with modular pricing.

competitors.name: Info-Tech HRMS
competitors.target_market: SG mid-sized SMEs with dedicated HR
competitors.sg_pricing_published: From S$2-3/emp/mo or PSG-priced annual bundles (Lite 25 S$5,700 to Pro 200 S$32,000).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Long-standing SG HRMS+payroll, PSG pre-approved.
strengths: Very low per-seat cost at scale

competitors.name: Opensoft HR
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based; PSG + SFEC up to 90% offset.
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG HRMS tuned for construction/FW payroll edge cases.

competitors.name: SimplePay Singapore
competitors.target_market: Micro-SMEs and accountants running payroll for clients
competitors.sg_pricing_published: S$12/emp/mo first 3; +S$4 per emp 4-25; +S$3 per emp 26+.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Simple, per-employee SG payroll SaaS with IRAS submission.

competitors.name: Singroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Free for up to 4 employees (with ads); Lite S$60/mo up to 10; Premium S$90/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Truly free SG payroll for the smallest businesses.
strengths: Built by SME owners for SMEs

competitors.name: Omni HR
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Core HR S$3/emp/mo + S$1 per module (payroll, performance, etc).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Modern APAC-first HRIS for fast-growing startups.

competitors.name: Employment Hero
competitors.target_market: ANZ + SG SMEs wanting unified HR+payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Premium S$5/emp/mo; Platinum S$10/emp/mo; min S$100/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: End-to-end HR-to-payroll platform with strong ANZ pedigree.
weaknesses: SG compliance still maturing vs local incumbents

competitors.name: Grove HR
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Essentials FREE <50 employees (inc. payroll/payslip); Perform US$4-5/emp/mo; Engage US$6-7.50/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Free core HR with optional performance + engagement modules.
weaknesses: Support is thin for free users

competitors.name: PeopleStrong
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Custom; from ~US$3/user/mo at 500+ employees.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Asian HCM for mid-to-enterprise employers.

competitors.name: Kissflow HR
competitors.sg_pricing_published: ~US$9.90/user/mo base; Enterprise tier US$1,500/mo bundles.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Low-code workflow + HR modules.

competitors.name: StaffAny
competitors.target_market: SG F&B + retail with shift workers
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Scheduling S$79-99/roster/yr; PayrollAny S$6/user/mo (min 2 rosters per 10 users).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Best-in-class shift scheduling+payroll for SG F&B.

competitors.name: Workstem
competitors.target_market: HK/SG F&B, retail, services w/ hourly workers
competitors.sg_pricing_published: ~S$4-8/emp/mo; quote-based.
competitors.primary_value_prop: All-in-one HRM for shift-based SG SMEs.

competitors.name: SMEPayroll
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs wanting cheap cloud payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based. Self-reported '$2-5/emp/mo' tier.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Very low-cost SG payroll for price-sensitive SMEs.

competitors.name: Sleek
competitors.target_market: SG digital-first startups & SMEs, incorp + accounting + payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Payroll S$300/emp/yr (~S$25/emp/mo). Accounting bookkeeping from S$60-200/mo. Incorp + CorpSec bundled.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Digital corp-sec/accounting/payroll one-stop for SG SMEs.
weaknesses: Uses Talenox under the hood for payroll

competitors.name: Osome
competitors.target_market: SG digital SMEs for incorp/accounting; smaller payroll presence
competitors.sg_pricing_published: DIY plan S$5/mo; accounting/corpsec bundles SGD hundreds/mo. Payroll typically quoted S$15-25/emp/mo alongside accounting.
competitors.primary_value_prop: All-in-one back office for SG digital SMEs.
weaknesses: Payroll is an add-on, not lead product

competitors.name: Counto
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs wanting AI-automated accounting + embedded payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Payroll add-on S$15/emp/mo. Accounting monthly S$100-110/mo. Corpsec S$325/yr.
competitors.primary_value_prop: AI-powered accounting with free payroll up to 5 employees.

competitors.name: HeySara
competitors.target_market: SG digital SMEs for corpsec + payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: CorpSec S$199-998/yr. Payroll from S$200/mo (varies by headcount; effectively S$20-40/emp/mo at small HC).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Digital corpsec with bundled payroll for SG SMEs.
weaknesses: Payroll effective per-emp price high at micro

competitors.name: Piloto Asia
competitors.target_market: Foreign owners setting up SG entity + payroll (2-200 emp)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Payroll outsourcing S$1,000-1,200/mo all-in for 8-employee team (i.e. ~S$125-150/emp/mo); or 8-12% of gross payroll.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-service incorp + payroll + bank opening for foreign founders.
weaknesses: Much pricier per-emp than Elitez at micro
Targets foreign, not local, SME owners

competitors.name: Rikvin
competitors.target_market: Foreign + local SG SMEs; part of InCorp Group
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based. Industry band S$15-30/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Long-standing SG CPA/corpsec/payroll firm.

competitors.name: InCorp Global
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Payroll from ~S$3.50/emp/mo software + managed fees; full managed ~S$15-25/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Corporate services group; corpsec + accounting + payroll + HR.
strengths: One of largest SG corpsec groups

competitors.name: BoardRoom
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based. Industry S$5-20/emp/payslip.
competitors.primary_value_prop: 50-year SG corpsec/payroll incumbent for listed & MNC clients.

competitors.name: PayrollServe (RSM Stone Forest)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based. Industry ~S$15-30/emp/mo managed.
competitors.primary_value_prop: RSM-backed managed payroll division with deep SG roots.

competitors.name: ADP Singapore
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based; SMB starter from ~S$70/mo base + per-emp fees.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Global payroll incumbent, scale + compliance.
weaknesses: No EOR play for small SG

competitors.name: Deloitte SG Payroll
competitors.target_market: Large SG MNCs and listed groups
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based only.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Big 4 payroll for complex listed-co compliance.

competitors.name: PwC SG Payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based only.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Big 4 payroll + tax mobility.

competitors.name: EY SG Payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based only.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Big 4 tax + payroll operate.

competitors.name: KPMG SG Payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based only.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Big 4 global mobility payroll.

competitors.name: Forvis Mazars SG
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based. Industry ~S$15-40/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Top-10 global accounting firm SG outsourcing.

competitors.name: Timcole
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs in F&B, retail, logistics, ecomm
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Bookkeeping from S$188/mo; payroll quote-based. Managed likely S$15-30/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG boutique corp-sec + accounting + payroll for SMEs.

competitors.name: Ardent Associates
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Quote-based only.
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG boutique accounting + payroll outsourcing.

competitors.name: Paul Hype Page & Co
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Incorp packages S$600+; payroll quote-based (industry ~S$20-35/emp/mo).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-stack SG back-office for foreign-founded Pte Ltds.

competitors.name: SingaporeAccounting.com (SAC)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Managed payroll from S$30/mo up to 5 employees (~S$6/emp/mo); full service S$4-10/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: Cheapest SG managed payroll for under-5 employee firms.

competitors.name: Koh Management
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs wanting cheap outsourced payroll
competitors.sg_pricing_published: From S$30-100/mo starter packages (up to 5 emp).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Low-cost SG managed payroll for 1-10 staff.

competitors.name: Ian & Son
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Managed payroll quote-based; industry placement S$15-25/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG boutique accounting + payroll with work-pass support.

competitors.name: Mighty Glory Corporate Solutions
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Payroll from S$88/mo up to 5 emp (~S$17/emp/mo).
competitors.primary_value_prop: Affordable SG back-office for very small teams.

competitors.name: CFO Group (cfoacc.com.sg)
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Managed payroll quote-based; from ~S$15-25/emp/mo.
competitors.primary_value_prop: CFO-grade outsourced finance + payroll for SG SMEs.

competitors.name: Workmate (now part of Persol)
competitors.target_market: SG F&B, retail, logistics gig / blue-collar labour
competitors.sg_pricing_published: Typically a % markup on gig wages (~15-25%); no per-emp flat fee published.
competitors.primary_value_prop: On-demand blue-collar staffing platform (EOR-ish for gig workers).
